experiment: SOP v2 first run on CC TS 513K lines
reading_goal: Understand CC architecture — core runtime, tools, AI integration, UI, state, commands

scout.output: 6 reader groups, 15 critical files, directory map

notable_cross_cutting_candidates: Feature-gated dead code elimination via bun:bundle feature() — found in Reader 1 (query.ts), Reader 6 (commands.ts, skills), Reader 4 (permissions UI)
Prompt cache preservation — found in Reader 1 (message immutability + header latching), Reader 3 (beta header latching, FORK_SUBAGENT cache hit)
buildTool factory pattern — found in Reader 1 (Tool.ts definition), Reader 2 (all 7 tools use it), Reader 3 (AgentTool, MCPTool, WebSearchTool)
Permission system layering — found in Reader 1 (ToolPermissionContext), Reader 2 (bash 23 security checks, path validation), Reader 4 (permission UI dispatch)
Memoization as architecture — found in Reader 3 (MCP connection), Reader 4 (Markdown LRU, renderToScreen singletons), Reader 6 (commands registry, skill loading)
AsyncGenerator streaming pipeline — found in Reader 1 (query→queryLoop→callModel), Reader 2 (BashTool runShellCommand), Reader 3 (queryModel→withRetry→API)
